title: Mistik 3 Logi Puaka
overview: A horror movie anthology containing three stories; Ramlee - a scriptwriter aims to win an Oscar award but went in a wrongful path to attain it, Ravi - a school teacher bought a second-hand handphone without knowing that an evil spirit resides in it, and a bus travels into a different dimension.
